genre_preference.value: disliked sci-fi, mixed feelings about drama and suspense
evidence: "A thrown together SYFY movie is probably better than his."
"The movie is about a girl who has the ability to see the evil side of the person... I was expecting a lot more out of this movie."
"The plot is a bit more of a just-write-the-story-as-we-go-along type."
"The story line is semi-obvious along w/ the prime suspect (villain)."
"It is a slow-burning story, but the ending makes it well worth the watch."
"A nice and slow build up to nowhere."
"The creep factor is not really strong."
No specific mentions of favorite directors or actors.
No strong loyalty to franchises or series.
"The gore and/or blood factor was not overused."
"The movie is not relatively scary either."
"I was expecting a lot more out of this movie."

summary: The user shows a strong dislike for sci-fi and prefers simple narratives with slow pacing. They are not particularly sensitive to production quality and do not exhibit strong loyalty to specific creators. Overall, their reviews indicate a focus on story over emotional engagement, often expressing disappointment in the films they watched.
